MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Sheila Robello for Anne Dillon (Executor)

Ms. Robello stated the amended petition is complete, it was sent to the client last week, she is waiting to get the signature back, and requested 30 days continuance.

The Petition for Termination of Estate on Final Distribution is continued to November 18, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Charlene P. Kiesselbach. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

The Petition for Termination of Estate on Final Distribution is continued to September 23, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.
